meaning: n.野禽,猎鸟(尤指野鸭,野鸡等)
examples: The gravel pits have been landscaped and planted to make them attractive to wildfowl.
By the time of the inquest, the wildfowl season was at an end.
This was, until a few years ago, a wonderful wetland, teeming with waders and wildfowl.
The Wildfowl and Wetlands Trust (WWT) is working with Bulgarian conservationists on the project.
The authority said 40, 000 wildfowl and wading birds migrated to the protected tidal estuary habitats each year.
